threats.title: Origin spoofing / CSRF on /mcp
threats.description: Forged Origin header to mount cross-site requests.

threats.title: Oversized request body
threats.description: Large body to exhaust isolate memory/CPU.
threats.mitigation: 10 KB body cap read before parse.

threats.title: Weak request attribution
threats.mitigation: Encrypted access log + hashed analytics principals.

threats.title: Distributed free-tier budget abuse
threats.description: Many IPs drain shared global budget.
threats.mitigation: Global quota DO; per-IP limits; residual.

threats.title: JWT alg confusion / none
threats.mitigation: HS256 pinned; alg checked before verify.

threats.title: Tier-claim tampering
threats.mitigation: Signature verified before claims; tier enum.

threats.title: Auth-code injection/replay
threats.mitigation: PKCE S256; single-use codes with TTL.

threats.title: STRUCTURED_RESULT leakage
threats.mitigation: Omitted for interactive clients; sanitized findings.

threats.title: Homoglyph/IDN bypass
threats.mitigation: Normalization + public-suffix checks; needs explicit IDN tests.

threats.title: DNS rebinding TOCTOU
threats.description: Validated host resolves internal at fetch.

threats.title: DNS reflection/flood
threats.mitigation: Rate limits; queries to public DoH.

threats.title: DO state manipulation
threats.mitigation: DO reachable only via in-account binding.

threats.title: OAuth code/JTI disclosure
threats.mitigation: Short single-use TTL; platform encryption at rest.

threats.title: Trial-key disclosure
threats.mitigation: Platform encryption at rest; bounded lifetime.

threats.title: bv-web unavailability
threats.mitigation: Static key fallback; free tier unaffected.

findings.title: API key accepted via query parameter
OAuth issuer from spoofable Host header
Rate limiting, quotas & DoS budgets (existing control)
Internal routes default to no bearer auth
JWT retains elevated tier after plan downgrade
Trial-key tier persists during cache window
Sensitive KV records rely on platform isolation only
